'''βàök-ch-t-f''' ('''kakachtefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:televisualize|televisualize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:televisualize|televisualize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàök-ch-t-f
|-
! Lemma
| kakachtefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachtefoko|thikachtefoko]] || [[word:jikachtefoko|jikachtefoko]] || [[word:shikachtefoko|shikachtefoko]] || [[word:kikachtefoko|kikachtefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachtefoko|thuthukachtefoko]] || [[word:jujukachtefoko|jujukachtefoko]] || [[word:shushukachtefoko|shushukachtefoko]] || [[word:kukukachtefoko|kukukachtefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachtefoko|thukachtefoko]] || [[word:jukachtefoko|jukachtefoko]] || [[word:shukachtefoko|shukachtefoko]] || [[word:kukachtefoko|kukachtefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachtefoko|thukachtefoko]] || [[word:jukachtefoko|jukachtefoko]] || [[word:shukachtefoko|shukachtefoko]] || [[word:kukachtefoko|kukachtefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachtefoko|thekachtefoko]] || [[word:jekachtefoko|jekachtefoko]] || [[word:shekachtefoko|shekachtefoko]] || [[word:kekachtefoko|kekachtefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachtefoko|thothokachtefoko]] || [[word:jojokachtefoko|jojokachtefoko]] || [[word:shoshokachtefoko|shoshokachtefoko]] || [[word:kokokachtefoko|kokokachtefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachtefoko|thokachtefoko]] || [[word:jokachtefoko|jokachtefoko]] || [[word:shokachtefoko|shokachtefoko]] || [[word:kokachtefoko|kokachtefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachtefoko|thokachtefoko]] || [[word:jokachtefoko|jokachtefoko]] || [[word:shokachtefoko|shokachtefoko]] || [[word:kokachtefoko|kokachtefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠkachtefoko|thΟΠkachtefoko]] || [[word:jΟΠkachtefoko|jΟΠkachtefoko]] || [[word:shΟΠkachtefoko|shΟΠkachtefoko]] || [[word:kΟΠkachtefoko|kΟΠkachtefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachtefoko|thakachtefoko]] || [[word:jakachtefoko|jakachtefoko]] || [[word:shakachtefoko|shakachtefoko]] || [[word:kakachtefoko|kakachtefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachtefoko|thakachtefoko]] || [[word:jakachtefoko|jakachtefoko]] || [[word:shakachtefoko|shakachtefoko]] || [[word:kakachtefoko|kakachtefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
